description: Legacy transpose compute API (transpose_wh_init / transpose_wh_init_short / transpose_wh_tile) deprecated in favor of compute_kernel_hw_startup() + transpose_init() / transpose_tile() in api/compute/transpose.h. Delete the whole api/compute/transpose_wh.h shim once all call sites are migrated.

Legacy in-DST transpose compute API (transpose_wh_dest_init_short / transpose_wh_dest) deprecated in favor of transpose_dest_init() / transpose_dest() in api/compute/transpose_dest.h. Delete the whole api/compute/transpose_wh_dest.h shim once all call sites are migrated.
